description_long: This electric drill features a robust, cylindrical body with a dark metallic front section and a maroon, slightly weathered rear housing. The handle is ergonomically shaped, matching the maroon color of the main body, and is adorned with red grip accents for improved handling. The front section includes a textured, knurled chuck area, but no drill bit is currently attached. Perforated ventilation holes are visible along the black metallic midsection, likely for cooling the internal motor. The surface finish is matte with some visible wear, suggesting frequent use. There is a faint, gold-colored marking or logo on the side of the maroon housing, though the text is not fully legible.
description: A maroon and black electric drill with a textured handle, visible ventilation holes, and a knurled chuck, but no drill bit attached.
description_view_0: Front view showing the circular, open chuck and the cylindrical alignment of the drill.
description_view_1: Side view displaying the maroon body, ergonomic handle with red accents, ventilation holes, and a faint gold marking.
description_view_2: Rear view highlighting the rounded maroon back and the handle's curvature.
description_view_3: Opposite side view showing the maroon body, handle, and black metallic front, with ventilation holes visible.
